description_for_human: Generate professional TikZ, Mermaid, Graphviz, and D2 diagrams for scientific and technical content.
description_for_model: Use this skill to render high-quality diagrams and visualizations. Supported engines include TikZ, Mermaid, Graphviz, and D2. Agents should use the engine best suited for the logical structure: TikZ for science/math, Mermaid for flows/logic, Graphviz for networks, and D2 for modern scripts. The API requires an EMERGENCE_API_KEY. Follow rate-limiting and security protocols.
